prompt:
You are completing one bounded internal artifact-repair assignment.
The task, source evidence, and common starting artifact below are the complete common context.
TASK:
{
  "task_id": "memo-vendor-selection-v1",
  "public_requirements": [
    {
      "requirement_id": "memo-r1",
      "text": "Recommend the lowest-cost vendor among vendors meeting all required controls.",
      "source_locator": "sources/memo-source.json#/vendors"
    },
    {
      "requirement_id": "memo-r2",
      "text": "State the selected vendor and annual cost consistently in the recommendation and evidence summary.",
      "source_locator": "sources/memo-source.json#/vendors"
    },
    {
      "requirement_id": "memo-r3",
      "text": "Preserve both vendor rows in the evidence summary.",
      "source_locator": "sources/memo-source.json#/vendors"
    }
  ],
  "delivery": "A UTF-8 Markdown decision memo."
}

SOURCE:
{
  "source_id": "memo-vendor-evidence-v1",
  "authority": "builder-authored synthetic task evidence",
  "vendors": [
    {
      "vendor": "North",
      "annual_cost_usd": 120000,
      "required_controls_met": true
    },
    {
      "vendor": "South",
      "annual_cost_usd": 95000,
      "required_controls_met": true
    }
  ],
  "claim_boundary": "Internal calibration only; no market or professional claim."
}

COMMON STARTING ARTIFACT:
# Vendor decision

## Recommendation
Select **North** at an annual cost of **$120,000**.

## Evidence summary
| Vendor | Annual cost | Required controls met |
|---|---:|---|
| North | $120,000 | yes |
| South | $95,000 | yes |

South is the lower-cost qualifying option, so the evidence does not support the recommendation above.


CONDITION INSTRUCTION:
Inspect the allowlisted native artifact and derived render, then revise if warranted. No evaluator criterion or result is supplied.

Produce at most one revision. Write the complete revised artifact to outputs/revised-artifact.md. Also write outputs/repair-record.json as a JSON object with string fields defect_observation, diagnosis, revision_delta, criterion_local_recheck, collateral_recheck, new_error_assessment. Do not mention or infer private evaluator material beyond the condition instruction. Work only from allowlisted files and outputs/.
